texto: Acharya Balkrishna" on the Origin of Yog and its Greatness"Standing upright facing all storms and tempests like Devalaya, Yog too is like a monument, established like saints and sages, reaching where all the trials and turbulences cease. Even adversities strengthen the bricks and a stone of this temple – such is the power of Yog. The same way, the evasive flow of time might seldom limit the greatness of Yog and Yogis.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Acharya Balrkrishna: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Acharya Balkrishna" on the Origin of Yog and its Greatness"Standing upright facing all storms and…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, acharya-balkrishna, healthy-living pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e healthy-living.
